mapper.insert: insert into emp(username, name, gender, phone, job, salary, image, entry_date, dept_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{name}, #{gender},#{phone}, #{job},#{salary},#{image}, #{entryDate}, #{deptId},#{createTime},#{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
update emp set deleted = 1 where id in
#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from emp where id in
#{id}

delete from emp_expr where emp_id in
#{id}
